## Summary

<!-- What outcome does this change produce? -->

## Verification

<!-- List the exact checks you ran and any paths not tested. -->

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run ios:build` when iOS behavior or configuration changes

## Compatibility and safety

- [ ] I did not add credentials, private user data, or private product plans.
- [ ] I considered both Bellwire Cloud and fully self-hosted deployments.
- [ ] I documented migrations, breaking API changes, or new external resources.
- [ ] Every commit contains a DCO `Signed-off-by` line.
